title: Eva 20 tickets with Rei Yahoo
wikitext:
[]: Eva 2.0: tickets with Rei. Yahoo!             Quote Post by RVR » Tue Mar 31, 2009 1:27 am

[]:             Quote Post by Ingraman » Tue Mar 31, 2009 2:00 am Little restyle for the plugsuit, in the same way as the Asuka's one.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Mar 31, 2009 2:58 am Changes to suit I can see are the addition of a little orange on the glove itself (on the back of her hand), and the extra red in the neck area. I knew the central button thing was turned red to hint at an angel core. I peaked at my 1.0 quickly and if the ticket is any indication they made a few minute changes to the Rei suit. Anyone spot others? You do know what this means though? They'll have to go back to Film 1 AGAIN and digitally spruce Rei's suit up to match with the other films. And Evangelion 1.21 perhaps?

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Tue Mar 31, 2009 3:20 am Will the change be just for style for the ticket or will Rei's plugsuit really look different (I wonder)?

[]:             Quote Post by Ingraman » Tue Mar 31, 2009 5:04 am Oedipusfoot wrote: Will the change be just for style for the ticket or will Rei's plugsuit really look different (I wonder)?

[]:             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Tue Mar 31, 2009 7:19 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: Changes to suit I can see are the addition of a little orange on the glove itself (on the back of her hand), and the extra red in the neck area. I knew the central button thing was turned red to hint at an angel core. I peaked at my 1.0 quickly and if the ticket is any indication they made a few minute changes to the Rei suit. Anyone spot others? You do know what this means though? They'll have to go back to Film 1 AGAIN and digitally spruce Rei's suit up to match with the other films. And Evangelion 1.21 perhaps?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 31, 2009 8:06 am Rei and Shinji will probably just get new plugsuits for 2.0. "Here's the new model, kids. By the way, the design is barely different."

[]:             Quote Post by bryan2369 » Tue Mar 31, 2009 11:13 am What, are they gonna re-do the plugsuits after every film? Like Yogurt says in Spaceballs: "Merchandising, merchandising, where the real money from the movie is made. Spaceballs the T-shirt, Spaceballs the Coloring Book, Spaceballs the Lunch box, Spaceballs the Breakfast Cereal, Spaceballs the Flame Thrower!" Clearly Anno has learned something from that move!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Mar 31, 2009 12:41 pm It's obvious (at least I think) that Mari's going to be on that third one, unless they decide to pull a troll job and actually have Shinji. http://www.evageeks.org/evanews/wp-content/uploads/2009/03/rebuild_20_trailer_end.jpg I think Sadamoto did a good job with the illustrations for the images so far.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Mar 31, 2009 11:03 pm I'm 99% sure it's Mari as well. Unless they pull what I would consider to be a genius pull on the audience and have the ticket introduce us to a NEW and UNHEARD of Character. But no. It's probably Mari. Most likely they just want fans guessing about her till the last minute. I mean the one page on the Eva website that is still closed is the Character page i think. P.S. Sadamoto has been drawing these characters since 1994 (thereabouts), he could draw a smoldering Asuka and withdrawn Rei in his sleep.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Apr 01, 2009 2:09 am They want to keep us guessing about Mari because she's a FAR. I'm telling you guys... And her plug suit is piss-urine yellow!!!

[]:             Quote Post by bryan2369 » Thu Apr 02, 2009 12:53 am They want to keep us guessing about Mari because she's a FAR. I'm telling you guys... Ok, I might be an idiot for asking this, but what is a FAR?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Apr 02, 2009 1:11 am bryan2369 wrote: They want to keep us guessing about Mari because she's a FAR. I'm telling you guys... Ok, I might be an idiot for asking this, but what is a FAR?
